Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractResult
    AbstractResult is the base class for all the results returned by components that have to deal with formulae.
    AbstractTranslation
    Common implementation for translations of mathematical extensions.
    ArrayStream
    Stream fed from a sorted array of identifiers.
    ASTPlugin
     
    BindingSubstitution
    Substitution that binds the free identifiers passed to the constructor.
    BoundIdentDeclRemover
    A substitution that removes some bound identifier declarations, renumbering the remaining bound identifiers corresponding to kept declaration.
    BoundIdentifierShifter
    This substitution applies a standard offset to all externally bound identifiers occurring in a formula.
    BoundIdentSubstitution
    Substitution of some locally bound identifiers by arbitrary expressions.
    Cache<E>
    Implements an automatically resized array, that is an array that can be accessed at any index, without throwing an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.
    DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
    Default implementation of a type-checking rewriter that does not perform any rewrite by default.
    FactoryHelper
    Utility class for formula factories.
    FilteringInspector
    This class encapsulates the formula filter used to retrieve the positions of a sub-formula that satisfies the given filter criterion.
    FindingAccumulator<F>
    Core implementation for the inspection mechanism on formulas.
    FormulaChecks
    Utility class for ensuring that several conditions are met.
    FormulaTranslatabilityChecker
    Checks that a formula can be translated to some target factory.
    FormulaTranslator
    Translates a formula to some target factory.
    FreshNameSolver
    Helper class to compute fresh names.
    FreshNameSolver.StructuredName
    Representation of an identifier name in three components: an arbitrary prefix an optional numeric suffix an optional string of quote characters
    GivenTypeHelper
    Utility class for recognizing given types, extracting their identifiers from a type and sort them.
    IdentListMerger
    Stream of identifiers.
    IntStack
    A stack of non-negative integers.
    ITypeCheckingRewriter
    Common protocol for an internal formula rewriter which is also responsible for checking that the resulting formula is type compatible with the original formula.
    LegibilityResult
    This class represents a result of a well-formedness check on a formula.
    MergingStream
    Merging streams that merge two other streams.
    Position
    Implementation of a position in a formula.
    SameTypeRewriter
    Perform a simple rewriting of formula where neither the language nor the types change.
    SimpleSubstitution
    Free identifier substitution.
    Specialization
    Common implementation for specializations.
    Specialization.SpecializationFormulaRewriter
     
    Specialization.SpecializationTypeRewriter
     
    Substitute<T extends Formula<T>>
    Common abstraction for a substitute formula used in a substitution.
    Substitute.BoundIdentSubstitute
    Susbtitute where the formula consists of a bound identifier.
    Substitute.ComplexSubstitute<T extends Formula<T>>
    Complex substitute where the formula does contain some externally bound identifiers.
    Substitute.ComplexSubstituteWithOffset<T extends Formula<T>>
    Complex substitute where the formula does contain some externally bound identifiers, and where an additional offset needs to be applied.
    Substitute.SimpleSubstitute<T extends Formula<T>>
    Simple substitute where the formula doesn't contain any externally bound identifier.
    Substitution
    Abstract super class for all kinds of substitutions operated on formulas.
    TypeRewriter
    Common implementation of classes that transform Event-B types.
    TypeTranslatabilityChecker
    Checks that a type can be translated to some target factory.
